name: Soul
description: Autonomous thinking, emotional awareness, and memory system for OpenClaw

enabled.description: Enable soul service (background thoughts, ego state). Default: true

checkIntervalMs.description: Interval for thought generation checks (ms). Default: 60000

proactiveMessaging.description: Enable proactive messaging when soul has thoughts. Default: true

proactiveChannel.description: Channel for proactive messages (auto-detected if omitted)

proactiveTarget.description: Target for proactive messages (auto-learned from first inbound message if omitted)

llm.description: LLM configuration for soul thought generation

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name for API key (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY)
